Update CHANGELOG with the post-rename fixes

The Unreleased section covered the rename + normalize +
playlist + Colab notebook, but the four subsequent fixes
landed without a CHANGELOG entry:
- 3 cloud-notebook issues (LD_LIBRARY_PATH, streaming,
  VRAM note)
- per-session upload default for drive notebook
- NVENC canary false negative on real T4 hardware
- drive notebook as a new file

Reorganized the Unreleased section to group Fixed entries
at the end and added the missing entries with rationale for
each. No code or test changes; docs-only.
